name: mirofish
description: MiroFish - 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.services:start: echo 'Starting Neo4j and Qdrant...' && docker compose up -d && echo '✓ Neo4j: http://127.0.0.1:7474 (bolt://127.0.0.1:7687)' && echo '✓ Qdrant: http://127.0.0.1:6333'
scripts.services:stop: docker compose down && echo '✓ Services stopped'
scripts.neo4j:start: docker compose up -d neo4j && echo '✓ Neo4j: http://127.0.0.1:7474 (bolt://127.0.0.1:7687)'
scripts.neo4j:stop: docker compose stop neo4j && echo '✓ Neo4j stopped'
scripts.qdrant:start: docker compose up -d qdrant && echo '✓ Qdrant: http://127.0.0.1:6333'
scripts.qdrant:stop: docker compose stop qdrant && echo '✓ Qdrant stopped'
scripts.dev: npm run services:start && concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend" -c "green,cyan" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
